title: SiTime Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript - Sequential Growth Acceleration
text: SiTime Q2 2024 earnings call revealed sequential growth acceleration with revenue of $43.9 million, up 33% sequentially and 58% year-over-year. The company beat guidance and analyst estimates. Communications, Enterprise and Data Center (CED) segment showed strong momentum with $15.2 million in revenue, up 208% year-over-year and 55% sequentially, indicating emerging strength in AI-related infrastructure demand. Automotive, Industrial and Aerospace (AIA) segment contributed $14.8 million, up 20% year-over-year and 15% sequentially. Mobile IoT and Consumer (MIC) segment was $13.8 million, up 33% year-over-year and 34% sequentially. Non-GAAP gross margins were 57.7%, showing margin recovery as volume increased.
